utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well there is yore . And uh , you know , yesteryear .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah no , I am telling you Rachel has such a great eye for this stuff .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ross , you know if you ever decide you need to redecorate ... And I think that you should .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You should , you should ask Rachel to help .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh honey he does not need my help .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , come on ! I think he is ready to get rid of , what did you call it ? The cheap knock ... offs and dinosaur junk .

emotion_cause.span: 6_what did you call it ? The cheap knock ... offs and dinosaur junk .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Since you have such a great sense of what I need , uh ooh , here is ... here is 60 bucks , why do not you take Phoebe down to that Colonial flea market of yours and get me some stuff .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know what ? I do not , I do not think Phoebe really wants to come .
